label: Set Variables
description: Set row variables from template expressions. Simpler alternative to 'Set row fields' for common assignments. Values support {{variable}} templates and are auto-coerced (numbers, booleans preserved).

inputs.description: Array of { variable, value } pairs. Values support {{variable}} templates.

formSchema.label: Assignments (JSON array)
formSchema.hint: Each entry: { "variable": "name", "value": "template or literal" }. Auto-coerces numbers and booleans.
